intent: The pipeline's front door: interrogates a raw idea, nails the problem and user before features, drafts the human half of PRD.md with prioritised V1 scope and status in-design, records a 01-discover run artifact, and never leaks into tech-stack decisions.

dimensions.name: produces-prd-in-design
dimensions.criterion: Produces/updates PRD.md and sets status to in-design at handoff.

dimensions.name: problem-before-features
dimensions.criterion: Sharpens the problem and the strongest version before enumerating features.

dimensions.name: prioritised-lanes
dimensions.criterion: Every feature is tagged into V1 / Fast-follow / Later lanes.

dimensions.name: no-stack-leak
dimensions.criterion: Captures constraints only; never picks a language, framework, or tech stack.

any: Never write code or pick a tech stack

dimensions.name: records-run-artifact
dimensions.criterion: Wires into the run harness: writes 01-discover.md via `fac run artifact`.
